auth.loginDescription: Sign in to continue to your CLEO workspace.
auth.loginAsideBody: Use your email and password to pick up where you left off and access the tools available to you.
auth.registerDescription: Set up your workspace access with your name, email, and password.
auth.registerAsideBody: Create an account to sign in, manage your workspace, and continue with the tools assigned to you.
auth.forgotDescription: Request a one-time code, then set a new password to get back into your workspace.
auth.forgotAsideBody: Use your account email to request a short-lived code. In local development, the code is written to the backend logs so you can complete the reset flow quickly.
auth.forgotRequestHint: Enter the email tied to your account. If it exists, we'll issue a one-time reset code and log it on the backend for local development.
auth.genericError: We couldn't complete that request. Please try again.
auth.forgotUnsupportedBody: Please return to login with your current password or contact your workspace administrator for help.
auth.forgotUnsupportedHint: Use your current password to sign in.

chat.initialMessage: I am CLEO, your intelligent AI avatar. How can I help you today?
chat.responseWhatIsCleo: CLEO (Contextual Learning & Enterprise Oracle) is a premium AI-driven workspace assistant designed to provide grounded, reliable answers from your documentation and knowledge base. I combine advanced LLM reasoning with precise retrieval to give you the exact information you need.
chat.responseWhatCanCleoDo: I can analyze your internal documentation, summarize complex technical guides, help you debug code, and provide grounded answers with direct citations. I also feature a 'Neural Link' voice mode for hands-free intelligence when you're on the go.
chat.responseHowToUseCleo: Simply type your question in the chat bar, for voice interactions use the speech mode.
chat.emptyState: How can I help you today?
chat.emptyStateHint: Ask me anything about our documentation.
chat.noContext: No relevant documentation found for your question.
chat.offlineHint: Attempting to reconnect... Check your backend connection.
chat.uncertainDesc: I found some information but I'm not confident it answers your question.
chat.azureMode: General knowledge answer (not specific to our product)
chat.historyEmpty: Start a new chat to save a conversation for this account.
chat.deleteChatMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this chat history? This action cannot be undone.

voice.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. Please allow microphone permissions.
voice.notSupported: Voice mode is not supported in this browser.
voice.noMicrophone: No microphone detected. Please connect a microphone.
voice.networkError: Network error during speech recognition. Check your connection.
voice.ttsError: Text-to-speech failed. Showing text response only.

documents.title: Document Library
documents.subtitle: Upload private PDF or Markdown files, let CLEO index them in the background, and then query them from your authenticated chats.
documents.unauthBody: Document uploads are user-scoped. Log in to add private files, watch them process, and use them in your chat sessions.
documents.loadError: We couldn't load your uploaded documents.
documents.empty: No uploaded documents yet. Add a PDF or Markdown file to start grounding your own chats.

system.adminSubtitle: Real-time ingestion telemetry and connectivity tracing for CLEO edge nodes.
system.syncManagerDesc: Browse books, chapters, and pages before deciding what enters the indexed knowledge base.
system.runFirstSync: Run your first sync to index BookStack pages.
system.accessControlDesc: Review users, assign multiple roles, and unlock sync access when needed.
system.roleRequired: At least one role is required.
system.selectRolesHint: Select one or more roles, then save the access policy.
system.syncManagerSubtitle: Control exactly which books, chapters, and pages feed the shared CLEO knowledge base.
system.hierarchyDesc: Book → Chapter → Page, with support for direct book-level pages.
system.noPagesInChapter: No pages found in this chapter.
system.pagesFound: No pages found in this chapter.
system.noBooksFound: No books were returned from BookStack.
system.noBooks: No books were returned from BookStack.
system.syncControlsDesc: Save a selective sync scope, kick off a sync, or restore the last saved selection.
system.semanticsBook: Selecting a book includes every page in that book.
system.semanticsChapter: Selecting a chapter includes all pages inside that chapter.
system.semanticsPage: Individual pages stay supported for partial sync scopes.
